use_cases: Interactive data visualization backdrop for landing pages and hero sections
Artistic Voronoi tessellation effect for creative brand presentations
Interactive highlight system for showcasing featured content or pricing tiers
Dynamic background element for storytelling and narrative visualizations
Hoverable data exploration tool for dashboards and analytics interfaces
ai_summary: An interactive Voronoi diagram visualization component that renders a colorful tessellated pattern using gradient fills and SVG-based rendering. Features hover interactions that highlight individual cells and their neighboring regions, creating an engaging exploratory experience. Ideal for creative landing pages, interactive backgrounds, or as a unique data presentation element in SaaS and media applications.
